proof: git status, branch, HEAD, recent commits, lockfile MD5
verify README/List-Map and relevant per-list schema reports
python3 -m json.tool on every artifact JSON
pnpm exec prettier --check on touched markdown/json
no apps/packages/backend runtime edits in docs package
https-only, hostname policy, custom-link review, blocked scheme tests
keyboard, aria, focus return, disabled action copy
closeout maps every package artifact to a canonical destination, merge/split target, or explicit package-only exception with reason
